Beerko CC aayo kamal bc
Beerko CC aayo kamal bc

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Gharta mero yaha hoina banke Bardiya 
Timro ruple e kanxi dilai chordiya

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Maila dai hajur kexa keTa ho hallichalli
Thik xa dai dami dami dami 
Kata ho hami 
Bardiyama ho dai kata janu khai

5 Barsa love pareko girlfriend poila gai
Haha haha haha 
Manxe baulayasi kasko k lagxa ra khai

Vetna aauxu vanthi malai Kohalpurko chok ma
1 kartun raksi khaya maile risko jhokma

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Kata kata- yata yata 
Kata kata - yata yata 

Timrai saurai lagyapaxi timlai vetna man lagyo jhyamma jhyamma

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of ‚ÄúALPHA‚ÄĚ

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

‚Ėļ Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY ūüĒĒ Stay updated!
‚Ėļ YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema‚Äôs first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas 26th June
snippet.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

Watch the #WelcomeToTheJungleTrailer now and get ready for the wildest adventure of the year!

#WelcomeToTheJungle arrives in cinemas on 26th June, 2026 ūüćŅ

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali

snippet.title: Katar Katarma - Mahesh Kafle & Asmita Adhikari | Nischal Basnet | Official Remake Music Video
snippet.description:
Presenting the official music video for "Katar Katarma," a brilliant new remake track performed by the hit duo Mahesh Kafle and Asmita Adhikari. Featuring an exceptional performance by Nischal Basnet, Loonibha Tuladhar and  Rachana Neupane, this upbeat and energetic Nepali song blends infectious rhythms with a lively story. Dive into the celebration and dance along!

The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn‚Äôt remember him‚ÄĒand the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him‚ÄĒsparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn‚Äôt forgotten them.

snippet.title: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka | Superhit Romantic Rain Song | Andaaz
snippet.description:
Relive the magic of Bollywood romance with "Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka", a timeless melody from the blockbuster movie . Sung by the legendary voices of Kumar Sanu and Alka Yagnik, this evergreen rain song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and monsoon romance.

Featuring Akshay Kumar, Priyanka Chopra, and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most cherished romantic tracks of the 2000s.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)
Song: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka 
Starring: Akshay Kumar, Lara Dutta, and Priyanka Chopra
Singer: Alka Yagnik, Babul Supriyo
Music: Nadeem Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Directed by: Raj Kanwar

snippet.title: Mohammad Faiz ‚Äď Eyes (Official Video) | Starring Akanksha Choudhary
snippet.description:
Eyes is an R&B Trap and Rajasthani Pop song that fuses modern sounds with Rajasthani roots. A story of love, attraction, and the emotions hidden behind a glance, the song captures what words often cannot express.

snippet.title: Aarzu (with Asim Azhar) Official Music Video | Asim Azhar, Noor, Khan, Madhurxo
snippet.description:
If Aarzu found a place in your heart, Asim Azhar's rendition takes it even deeper. Wrapped in dreamy melodies and timeless emotion, this version captures the beauty of yearning for someone who never truly leaves.


Listen Now:
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/1GnZH0wek1fkGCQnUsK6D0?si=c8a640db631c4690 Apple Music -  https://music.apple.com/in/song/aarzu-with-asim-azhar/6772998267 
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=M5OCLifZK1w&si=F6FdB9DEXBskKoUu 

Audio Credits: 
Music by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Lyrics by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Vocals by Asim Azhar, Khan, Madhurxo
Written by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Produced by Noor
Guitars by Melvin Arthur
Mixed & Mastered by Kumail Abbas

Video Credits: 
Director - Khizar Sheikh
Producer - Syed Jahanzaib Ali
Executive Producer - Gul-E-Rana
D.O.P & Edit - Fraz KB 
Grade - Maaz Ahmad Ansari

Lyrics:

(Khan)

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

(Madhurxo)

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

(Asim Azhar)

Oh kaisi dilkashi 
Tujh se dillagi
Mere humnasheen‚Ä¶ hmmmm
Kioun chupaoun main
Ab koi darr nahi
Tu jaisay meri pari
Masoomiyut chulkay teri
Baatoun se kitni‚Ä¶hayee
Saada si jo adaa‚Äôein teri
Qatil hai woh
Dil ki meri

Peechay dekhoun raahein teri
Yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

(Unknown)

Phirse Bolo

(Asim Azhar)

Peechay dekho raahein teri
Yaad jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi‚Ä¶ tu hi basi

(Khan and Asim)

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi‚Ä¶ tu hi basi

(Outro)

Dono jahan teri muhabbat mein haar ke
Woh ja raha hai koi Shab‚Äôe Ghum guzaar ke
Weera‚Äôan hai maikada khum-o-saagar udaas hain     
Tum kya gaye k rooth gaye din bahaar

ms.title: Aarzu (with Asim Azhar) Official Music Video | Asim Azhar, Noor, Khan, Madhurxo
ms.description:
If Aarzu found a place in your heart, Asim Azhar's rendition takes it even deeper. Wrapped in dreamy melodies and timeless emotion, this version captures the beauty of yearning for someone who never truly leaves.


Listen Now:
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/1GnZH0wek1fkGCQnUsK6D0?si=c8a640db631c4690 Apple Music -  https://music.apple.com/in/song/aarzu-with-asim-azhar/6772998267 
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=M5OCLifZK1w&si=F6FdB9DEXBskKoUu 

Audio Credits: 
Music by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Lyrics by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Vocals by Asim Azhar, Khan, Madhurxo
Written by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Produced by Noor
Guitars by Melvin Arthur
Mixed & Mastered by Kumail Abbas

Video Credits: 
Director - Khizar Sheikh
Producer - Syed Jahanzaib Ali
Executive Producer - Gul-E-Rana
D.O.P & Edit - Fraz KB 
Grade - Maaz Ahmad Ansari

Lyrics:

(Khan)

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

(Madhurxo)

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

(Asim Azhar)

Oh kaisi dilkashi 
Tujh se dillagi
Mere humnasheen‚Ä¶ hmmmm
Kioun chupaoun main
Ab koi darr nahi
Tu jaisay meri pari
Masoomiyut chulkay teri
Baatoun se kitni‚Ä¶hayee
Saada si jo adaa‚Äôein teri
Qatil hai woh
Dil ki meri

Peechay dekhoun raahein teri
Yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

(Unknown)

Phirse Bolo

(Asim Azhar)

Peechay dekho raahein teri
Yaad jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi‚Ä¶ tu hi basi

(Khan and Asim)

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi‚Ä¶ tu hi basi

(Outro)

Dono jahan teri muhabbat mein haar ke
Woh ja raha hai koi Shab‚Äôe Ghum guzaar ke
Weera‚Äôan hai maikada khum-o-saagar udaas hain     
Tum kya gaye k rooth gaye din bahaar

The PJ Explained is a web channel intended to promote cinema through films review, interviews, discussions, video essays and analytical compilations. It is intended primarily for the purpose of encouraging informed discussions, criticism and review of cinema and towards such purpose the programs use short extracts of cinematograph films, sounds recording and photographic works. These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the compete work by the owners of the copyright. The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we asset our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

snippet.title: Oasis Thapa -  Sakey  |  ŗ§łŗ§ēŗ•á  [ Official Music Video ]
snippet.description:
sakey  |  ŗ§łŗ§ēŗ•á

Hi! bhanna ta dherai kura bhanna man cha tara kaa bata po suru garney... A song written 3 years ago with 3 different version each year. Ek point ma ta laageko thyo hyaa ettikai haaldinchu ma kina etro mehenat gariraachu bhanera tara khai man le namaanney. Ajjai pugena, yo bhayena, tyo bhayena, yo ajjai better garna sakchu, I can polish this a lot more bhanney soch le 3 barsa laagyo yo geet release garna. I guess this urge to serve quality everytime is a gift and a curse but so far I'm super satisfied with the end craft. The whole entire team was teaming. Yesai sndarva ma I hope I get to release my songs more consistently which I've written for over 4 years. Some old and some recent. Life been nerfing me so much I'm just discovering esto ni hudo raicha bhanera. I be like f'k yeah new year new energy and motivation to do more and then every year life be like here hold this new L for now. K sikaauna khojeko ni tha chaina. Just weird. There has been a few blessings I've received which I'm super grateful for though. There's this strong sense to protect that unlike anything. So, yeah a little life update but I really hope I can keep serving for now. See you guys on the next one.

snippet.description:
Music | Arrangement | Performed by : Rockheads
Lyrics : Ashtrona.
Composition : Rockheads / Ashtrona
Mixed|Mastered : Saswot shrestha (Omniphonics Studios)
Recorded by : Samyak Lama / Dawa Sherpa.
Recorded at : DrumroombyRockheads/ EOHLabs
Acoustic Guitar | Mandolin       : Saswot Shrestha.
Back vocals | Studio assistant :Pradhumna Shrestha 

Music video by Chinoetales Production.
..........................................................................

Visual Partner       : Triumph Events.
Venue partner      : Sasa Twa.
Decor Partner      : Garima Florist.
Musical Partner   : Harmonium Musicals.
Touring Partner   : Khadka groups (USA)
(2026)                  : Hamro Events (Canada)


Cast : 
Abhishek Khadka , Parika Bhandari

Supporting act : 
Amar Babu (Brother), Badri Pudasaini (Father), Ganu Koirala (Mother)

Director : Abhi Sampang Rai
D.O.P : Bikesh Magar
Creative Director: Devarshi.S
Asst. Director : Aakash Poudel
Art Direction: Shristi Rai, Ongdi Moktan
Project Manager: Aadi Pahari
Cinematographer: Prabin Gurung, Durga Singh Thakuri

Stylist: Bomi Rai
Assist Stylist: Nurja Rai
Content Manager: Santosh Shah Thakuri & Dipika Rai
Gaffer: Himal Sharma
Production Manager: Shyam Khadka
Assist prod: Arbin Uranw, Shankar Parajuli, Dhiraj Thapa Magar, Ashish Shrestha 
Kitchen : Sabin Shrestha and Team

Extras :
Puju Shrestha, Ranju Nepal, Sundar Pariyar, Dipak Gajamer, Sagar Panta, Jaya Ram Bhatta, DP Bhattarai, Sailendra Raj Bhattarai, Radha Krishna Bhatta, Mana Maya Magar, Prem Nath Pathak, Anita Giri, Suprina Nepal, Abshiek Rai, Radhika Thapa, Laxmi Budha, Anshika Gurung, Sandesh Tamang, Samir Diyali, Sujata Magar, ‚Ā†Samita Tamang, Namaraj Pokhral


Special Thanks : 
 
Parbat Bhandari dai for having such blind faith on us. Kiran Pratap Singh bhai for guiding us through this beautiful journey. Ashtrona - you are a true Artist and beautiful inspiring soul we have come across. Prajesh (Harmonium musicals) dai for constantly supporting us from day 1. 
Snehi Karmacharya, Arshia Shrestha, Dolmu Sherpa, Crishtina Tamang for supporting constantly and holding hands on this journey to follow this dream. Saswot shrestha bhai for handling the craziness we bring to your studio.
Our touring Crew - Sabin Shakya / Rupesh Gurung for all the hard work and tolerance.

Slick pick for producing such great Merch for us.

Subscribe to DreamStage Productions to stay updated with our latest music videos, exclusive releases, and exciting upcoming projects. Thank you for your support‚ÄĒmore amazing content is on the way!
Stay tuned for future releases and be part of our musical journey.
https://www.youtube.com/@UCknIU_nxhciR_kaB7mONdwQ 

Presenting the official music video of "Sannani," one of the most viral Nepali TikTok songs, reaching over 20 million people across social media platforms. This track combines catchy melodies, energetic beats, and an experimental musical style to create a unique listening experience. Originally released as an audio track on May 20, 2026, "Sannani" quickly became a major TikTok sensation. 

Audio Credits:
Vocals: Bikash Chandra Thapa, Beon Beats, Pawan Chand
Studio : Dreamstage Recording Studios
Producer/mix-master: Beon Beats
Featuring: Bikash, Beon, Pawan 
Genre: Nepali Melodic Hip-Hop, Experimental Song
Music Video Official Release 2026
Ownership Protected by : SwarVision Entertainment Pvt. Ltd.  
If you enjoyed the song, don't forget to:
Like, Comment, Subscribe & Share with your friends.

Production House: LOCOLIZE CREATIVES PVT. LTD.
Directed By: Bijesh Bajracharya & Aone Magar
Director of Photography (DOP): Sachet Kadel & Bijesh Bajracharya
Assistant Camera (AC): Ishwor Nagarkoti & NyamaSang Tamang
2nd Assistant Camera: Ganesh
Production Manager: Raman Khadgi
Production Assistants: Shristi Shrestha, Nirajan Adhikari & Estella Pujari

snippet.title: The Neighbourhood - Sweater Weather (Lyrics + Letra)
snippet.description:
ūü©łLyrics ‚Üí
All I am is a man
I want the world in my hands
I hate the beach, but I stand
In California, with my toes in the sand

Use the sleeves of my sweater
Let's have an adventure
Head in the clouds, but my gravity's centered
Touch my neck and I'll touch yours
You in those little high waisted shorts, oh

She knows what I think about
And what I think about
One love, two mouths
One love, one house
No shirt, no blouse
Just us, you find out
Nothing that wouldn't wanna tell you about no

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

And if I may just take your breath away
I don't mind if there's not much to say
Sometimes the silence guides our minds
To move to a place so far away

The goosebumps start to raise
The minute that my left hand meets your waist
And then I watch your face
Put my finger on your tongue, 'cause you love to taste, yeah

These hearts adore
Everyone the other beats hardest for
Inside, this place is warm
Outside, it starts to pour

Coming down
One love, two mouths
One love, one house
No shirt, no blouse
Just us, you find out
Nothing that I wouldn't wanna tell you about, no, no, no

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater, ooh, ooh

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
Let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

It's too cold
It's too cold
The holes of my sweater

snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let‚Äôs Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai | Varun, Mrunal, Pooja | Akshay & IP
snippet.description:
ūüĒ• Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year ‚ÄĒ Chunnari Chunnari - Let‚Äôs Go! ūüíÉ‚ú®
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! ūüé∂‚Ě§ÔłŹ

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! ūüēļūüĒ•

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai In Cinemas Now

Song Title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let‚Äôs Go!

Guitars: Chaitanya Bhaidkar
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Original Music: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP

Editor: Ritesh Soni
Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani

Action Director: Sunil Rodrigues

Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik
Associate Editor: Sanket Rajadhyaksha
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)
Di Studio : Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design: Parass Kanani (  House Of AWE)
Media Consultant : Nilufer Qureshi (Hype)

Marketing Consultant:  Yash Suchak & Suraj Rao (Grey Alchemy)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd. 

Lyrics : 
Chunari-Chunari
 
Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera
Hosh Tabiyat Lutt Ke Lae Gayi,
 
Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,
Kar Mujhko Tang Ye Kya Hai Keh Gayi,
 
Lehraaye Besharmi Se
Tadpaaye Berehmi Se
Chhoo Loon Tu Kehde Jo Zaraa.
 
Aaja Na Chhoo Le Meri Chunari Sanam
Kuchh Na Main Bolun Tujhey Meri Qasam.
 
Aaya Deewaana Darr Pe Tere
Tere Bin Kya Karoon Bataa De Bereham.
 
Mhare Dil Mein Bajee Pichkari,
Rangi Main Poori Thaari Sajna,
Teri Choonar Manay Samjhaa Ri,
Ke Ho Gi Tu Hai Mhaari Sajnaa.

snippet.title: Bhul Jana ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Bhul Jana ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Agar mumkin ho‚Ä¶
to hume bhul jana.

Hum tumhari zindagi me
sirf dard bankar aaye the‚Ä¶
aur ab yaadon me bhi
rehna nahi chahte.

Mohabbat sachchi thi meri‚Ä¶
par shayad
tumhare liye nahi thi.

‚ÄúBhul Jana‚ÄĚ
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo toot kar bhi
sirf dusre ki khushi chahta raha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
judai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai ‚ÄĒ

agar sukoon mile‚Ä¶
to hume bhul jana‚Ä¶

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho
aur phir use khud se door karna pada ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

snippet.title: The Elements | Thula Thula Sahar (EL3 Rendition)
snippet.description:
EL3 Renditions 

We revisit these stories after 10 years.. Some thing have changed, some things have not. In the mists of Tanahu . 

Video by : 
Sujan Bahadur Basnet 
Siddhartha Shakya (Sid)
Prabish Newa

Audio Recorded at : Elements HQ 
Produced by : Brihat Pahari | Raunaq Singh Adhikari
                         PaintBox Studios 


Lyrics:
thula thula sahar
thulai soch hola
beglai cha najar
tara sakkincha hola

thula thula mahal
akashai chekkincha hola
sararara motor ma kudincha hola

aye hai yo thawai ma
mann bhane chai tei gauwai ma
kate ma hai
kayou khola
mutu bhane 
kati rola

hawa le choyo
beglai lagyo sparsha 
khusi khojna nai
paila sardo raicha

auna ta mann thiyena 
mero baani chalan bhindai
paristhiti testai 
aye sabai nata uchindai

aye hai yo thawai ma
mann bhane chai tei gauwai ma
kate ma hai
kayou khola
mutu bhane 
kati rola

snippet.description:
Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ ŗ§óŗ§ĺŗ§úŗ§≤ŗ•á ŗ§łŗ•Āŗ§®ŗ§öŗ§įŗ•Ä ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan

Chitwan ‚Ě§ÔłŹ
the place where I took my first breath, walked my first steps, discovered the world for the first time, and heard my first music. Today, with love and gratitude for that homeland, I am proud to present my travel song, ‚ÄúGajale Sunchari.‚ÄĚ

This song is dedicated to all the wandering souls who love to travel freely, explore new places, and discover the beauty of life along the way.

the place where I took my first breath, walked my first steps, discovered the world for the first time, and heard my first music. Today, with love and gratitude for that homeland, I am proud to present my travel song, ‚ÄúGajale Sunchari.‚ÄĚ

This song is dedicated to all the wandering souls who love to travel freely, explore new places, and discover the beauty of life along the way.

ūüéĶ "Nachau Jhumera" is an energetic dance song performed by Yogesh Lama and Lamu Sherpa. Written, composed, and arranged by Yogesh Lama, the song features catchy melodies and an engaging musical arrangement. Directed by Nirmal Kumar Lama, with choreography by Bhimphedi Guys and Sagar Lopchan, the video brings together the performances of Sanjana Gurung, Bhimphedi Guys, Sagar Lopchan, Rushal Syangbo and Rupchen Tamang, creating an entertaining visual and musical experience.

A lo-fi bhajan combines traditional devotional music with the soothing, nostalgic qualities of lo-fi music. It features serene melodies and gentle rhythms that evoke a sense of peace and spiritual contemplation. The instrumentation often includes acoustic instruments like tabla, harmonium, sitar, and flute, layered over subtle lo-fi elements such as vinyl crackles or ambient sounds. The vocals, whether solo or in chorus, deliver devotional lyrics with heartfelt emotion, encouraging a meditative and reflective mood. This fusion creates a unique listening experience that merges ancient spiritual traditions with contemporary lo-fi aesthetics, offering a tranquil journey into inner harmony and reverence.

A lo-fi bhajan combines traditional devotional music with the soothing, nostalgic qualities of lo-fi music. It features serene melodies and gentle rhythms that evoke a sense of peace and spiritual contemplation. The instrumentation often includes acoustic instruments like tabla, harmonium, sitar, and flute, layered over subtle lo-fi elements such as vinyl crackles or ambient sounds. The vocals, whether solo or in chorus, deliver devotional lyrics with heartfelt emotion, encouraging a meditative and reflective mood. This fusion creates a unique listening experience that merges ancient spiritual traditions with contemporary lo-fi aesthetics, offering a tranquil journey into inner harmony and reverence.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun ‚ÄĒ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

snippet.title: Kasam Khake Kaho - Lyrical | Preity Zinta | Arjun Rampal | Mahima | Kumar Sanu | Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Song Credits :
Singer(s) : Alka Yagnik & Kumar Sanu
Music Director : Nadeem Shravan
Lyricist : Sameer

Lyrics :

Hey Hey Hey Aa Ha Ha...
Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho, Dil Lagake Kaho Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai 
 
Sharmake Kaho Balkhake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai
 
Ek Ajab See Dil Me Hasrat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Chahe Tumko Dil Me Chahat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Hame Pyar Karo, Ikrar Karo, Sanso Me Basake Rakh Lo
Tum Sham-O-Saher Didar Karo, Khwabo Me Chhupake Rakh Lo
 
Najar Jhukake Kaho, Palak Uthake Kaho
Ha Kaho Naa Kaho, Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Ek Bechainee See Hotee Hai, Abb Toh Tere Nam Se
Ishk Huwa Jab Se Naa Gujra Ek Lamha Aaram Se
Kya Hal Huwa Chahat Me Sanam, Mushkil Hai Tumse Kuchh Kehna
Hai Tumko Kasam Mehbub Kabhee, Aankho Se Dur Naa Rehna
Itrake Kaho, Jhilmilake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho
Han Kaho Naa Kaho, Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

#KasamKhakeKaho #DilHaiTumhaara #PreityZinta #ArjunRampal #AlkaYagnik #KumarSanu #MahimaChaudhary
